evals.prompt: Grill me on our bid strategy for this RFP.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads workspace KG (win_theme, hot_button, discriminator, competitor, evaluation_factor), detects Bid Strategy mode, reads references/bid-strategy.md, starts at question 1 with the incumbent name or other KG-sourced specifics substituted in, provides recommended answer, waits for response before asking question 2.

evals.prompt: I need to stress-test our win approach before the color review.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG context, detects Proposal mode (color review trigger), reads references/proposal.md, asks one question at a time starting with compliance matrix, adapts each question using extracted evaluation_factor and win_theme entities from the workspace.

evals.prompt: Challenge all of our assumptions before we go into the gate review.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, asks which area to stress-test (bid strategy / capture / proposal / pricing), loads KG after user answers, routes to correct reference file, grills relentlessly one question at a time, synthesizes risks at the end.
